IIEST Shibpur – Admission, Cutoff, Fees & Placements 2026

Engineering Colleges

Overview

Institute NameIndian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology, Shibpur
Also Known AsIIEST Shibpur
Institute TypeGovernment
Established1856
LocationShibpur, West Bengal

IIEST Shibpur: Admission | Ranking | Fees

Also Known as

Also known as IIEST Shibpur, BESU Shibpur, Bengal Engineering and Science University Shibpur, Bengal Engineering College Shibpur and Calcutta Civil Engineering College.

ADDRESS

Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology, Shibpur, Botanic Garden, Howrah, West Bengal - 711103

Nearest Airport and Railway Station

Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata
23 km
Howrah Junction Railway Station
5 km
Sealdah Railway Station
11 km

CAMPUS FACILITIES

RANKING

BodyCategoryRank (Year)
LatestPrevious
International Ranking
QS Asia University Rankings646 (2026)541-560 (2025)
National Ranking
NIRF Overall Rankings101-150 (2025)101-150 (2024)
NIRF Engineering Rankings54 (2025)49 (2024)
NIRF Architecture Rankings4 (2025)4 (2024)
The Week Best Technical Universities India16 (2023)--

MODE OF ADMISSION

  • Candidates must appear for the JEE (Main) exam and either secure at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class XII or be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in their respective Class XII board examination. For more details, refer to the JEE Main Performance Criteria in Class XII.
  • Admissions are based on the rank obtained in JEE (Main) through JoSAA Counselling and CSAB Special Round.

COURSES OFFERED

Please choose the course.

B.E./B.Tech. - 4 Years

  • Aerospace Engineering
  • Civil Engineering
  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Electrical Engineering
  • Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering
  • Information Technology
  • Mechanical Engineering
  • Metallurgy and Materials Engineering
  • Mining Engineering

B.Arch. - 5 Years

  • Architecture

FEE STRUCTURE

Institute Fee

ParticularsAmount
Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹3,000
Tuition Fee (per Semester)₹62,500
Other Fees (per Semester)₹5,500
Total₹71,000

Hostel Fee

ParticularsAmount
Mess Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹1,000
Hostel Seat Rent (per Semester)₹1,000
Electricity & Water Charges (per Semester)₹800
Other Fees (per Semester)₹6,200
Annual Fees₹3,000
Mess Advance (per Semester)₹17,500
Total₹29,500

Fee Waivers

  • 100% Tuition Fee waiver for SC/ST/PwD students.
  • 100% Tuition Fee remission for Most Economically Backward students with family income less than ₹1 lakh per annum.
  • 2/3rd Tuition Fee remission for Other Economically Backward students with family income between ₹1 lakh to ₹5 lakh per annum.

PLACEMENTS

  • 2025 (Ongoing)
  • Older

Highlights

  • Rs. 56.00 Lakhs per Annum offered to 3 students by Microsoft India (PPO)
  • Rs. 38.53 Lakhs per Annum offered to 6 students by Texas Instruments India (PPO)
  • Rs. 38.53 Lakhs per Annum offered to 5 students by Texas Instruments India
  • Rs. 33.40 Lakhs per Annum offered to 1 student by Google India
  • Rs. 30.00 Lakhs per Annum offered to 1 student by Goldman Sachs (PPO)
  • Rs. 24.01 Lakhs per Annum offered to 1 student by Siemens EDA India (PPO)

  • Rs. 21.78 Lakhs per Annum offered to 4 students by Synopsys India
  • Rs. 21.64 Lakhs per Annum offered to 5 students by BNY Mellon (PPO)
  • Rs. 21.29 Lakhs per Annum offered to 1 student by Serko India
  • Rs. 20.10 Lakhs per Annum offered to 9 students by Bharat Petroleum Corporation
